reviews.review_description: 3 out of 5 just for your lack of caring. That's it no more songs, no new. Changes or updates. You're losing me and many more drummers due to your lack of expansion. Did you make enough money to where you just abandoned us rockers. Shame on you and the lack of your  awesomeness

developer_response.body: Thanks Footie72, but it's the opposite. We were three developers and now it's just one, and life is not kind... but I'm developing an update for the community. Thank you for your passion for the game.

reviews.review_description:
This slaps in every way 
I play as much as I can just off the simple fact it’s created such a muscle memory for me that playing in a band it’s helped tremendously 
I tell literally everyone about this game 
Just keep adding metal and I’m game!!!

reviews.review_title: My #1 reason for using my oculus
reviews.review_description: Obsessed. This is the absolute best game and drum simulator ever. Actually recorded myself playing and learned hard, technical drum songs on a real electronic set through playing this game! Always looking for more updates and songs. Thank you so much!!!

developer_response.body: You nailed the game! We hope we can bring more features to keep you using your Oculus everyday!

reviews.review_title: The newest update has damaged the game
reviews.review_description: Adding all the new songs was great, but the game play isn't as good as it was and neither are the graphics. It feels like the tracking and hit boxes are off, the game seems to be lagging/buggy as well. Other wise the game was good. Please fix these!

developer_response.body: Edit:  I think you will like the current version available, give it a try, cheers!

reviews.review_description:
GrooVR might just be what the Virtual Reality needs in the music space. This game is very similar to Beat Saber and has all the fixings of Guitar Hero. I had a great time with this game and so glad I got to play it! I might just actually learn how to play the drums!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kIdlBzqtwaM

developer_response.body: Awesome!! Thank you so much! Check it out the new update.

reviews.review_description: I bought this game today to give it a try. I’ve played several drumming games in the past and currently playing a drumming game that I can play on extreme with no problems. I won’t mention the game on here. But anyway this game has good music. I had issues trying to setup the drums because after trying the tutorial I had to adjust the drums several times because at the default setting the drums sit very high. After saving my settings I still couldn’t get the drums setup correctly. I couldn’t find any beginner setup just so I can beat one song. This game has potential and is almost there. It’s still needs a lot of work that’s all I can say this game is not very user-friendly. There’s other issues I noticed about the game but after trying the tutorial and trying to play one song and couldn’t get to the end because of the drums not being set up correctly, I just exited out of the game and decided I’ll give this game a couple of more months and check back once I know they fixed some issues or did updates to correct some of the issues but if they can make these changes to the game to make it easier and better, this game will be awesome. To the devs. When I see some to better the game, I’ll change my review to a better review.

developer_response.body: Thanks Duke6638. I think you will like the current version available, give it a try, cheers!

reviews.review_title: Best Air Drumming game so far.
reviews.review_description: I don’t know how they put 40 licensed songs on this s game, the gamepay is precise and fluid.

I am unable to get the in game menus to respond. To add insult to injury the game is not 
eligible for a refund for some reason. Wasted my money. I did not know it was legal to sell faulty goods and then deny a refund.

developer_response.body: Hi. What do you think in trying to play the game again now? All those things was solved.

reviews.review_title: Great game has that rock band drums feel
reviews.review_description: I missed playing the rock band drums and other drum games don’t quite feel like they used too. This one does and it scratches that rockband itch. If you liked the drums on rockband you will like this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your Review! We hope to see you playing again in the final version! :D

reviews.review_description:
Game is an absolute blast to play and gets you moving!

PLEASE consider adding a favorite option for each song to make it simpler to locate specific songs again.

developer_response.body: Awsome Jake! Thank you! I will bring the update on the next release.

reviews.review_description: My only suggestion would be to add a part for the bass drum.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! Soon we will release a new update with new stages and songs!

reviews.review_description:
Update: 

With version 1.1 the hands have been removed while playing, which is great, however the sticks are not completely aligned with the handle of the controller - they still have an upward angle to them, so it’s still not quite right. Much better, but not there yet.

The speed of the hit indicators is still too fast and are beyond the drum when they should be centered to indicated a hit on the drum to match the timing on the songs correctly. However, I did notice on some songs that the hit indicator on the ride or crash is correct. 



Drummer w/ 23 yrs experience and an education in music (just to give my feedback some validity). The game has really great potential, but the thing that I immediately noticed is that the timing of when the hit discs are over the drums to indicate “hit now” is not in sync with the music bpm. The “hit now” discs are actually faster than the song’s bpm, so it’s anywhere from half off to 3/4 past the drum head when it should be dead center of the head in order to align properly with the bpm. This was the case on every song. So, I’m constantly missing the hits even though I should be hitting consistently. I can look down at the snare drum and see that the discs are past dead center when they should be dead center right when one would hit the snare on the twos and fours, for example.

The other issue is that the hands are grasping the sticks like they’re some sort of weapon, when in reality when one plays the drums, the wrist is relaxed so the sticks are nearly straight with the forearm, albeit angled inward when held. Tough to explain, but there’s a million YouTube videos to get that visual. This may be a limitation of using hands, so maybe it’s better to forgo the hands and have the sticks track perfectly with the Quest controllers instead since they can be held similarly to a drum stick, albeit much fatter. I think adding the hand throws in an extra unnecessary angle that just throws the natural way one would hold a drum stick off. That said, the player has to follow through the hit much more than they would do in reality due to the extra angle of having the virtual hands hold the sticks rather than the player holding virtual sticks themselves.

One visual that I noticed is that the order of the rack toms typically goes smallest to largest from left to right like 10”/12”/14”, whereas as the drums here goes something like 12”/10”/14”. One can argue that you really can set the drums up anyway you want. Speaking of which, that is one awesome thing that really stands out here is that you can totally customize the kit. That’s definitely a winner.

Keep polishing, my friend. You’re so close.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your new review, any details on possible improvements are really important to us and we will keep improving the game!!

Edit:  Check it out the new update!

reviews.review_description: Awesome feeling of air drumming, great songs too!!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We hope you like it as much as we do! Keep Grooving!

reviews.review_title: Greatest drum game on app lab
reviews.review_description: Definitely worth a download in my opinion it's the best drummer simulation

developer_response.body:
And It's about to get better : ) 
Thank you for your review! We will bring updates very soon and we would love to hear your thoughts on it.
Keep Grooving!

reviews.review_description: Great game, should be on the real App Store! Hope there will be more popular songs (would pay extra for it). Also  a more realistic room, maybe with other band members and a audience. I never was that into drums, but this game is a game changer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review MCWiggle! Our hope is go to the reall App Store soon as possible! We have a big roadmap for this game!

reviews.review_title: So very very close. Please keep going!
reviews.review_description: This game has incredible potential. It really does every time you update it. I open it straight away. Of course the biggest problem for me. I have yet to see get fixed but maybe it's just a me thing to the lovely developers working so hard. My name is Kenneth and if I can make one suggestion. I don't like that on the quest 2 (maybe not on PC. I'm unsure} the game gives you no sound on the drums. No feedback on the drums whatsoever unless you hit each drum at the exact time during a song. There's no judgment or prayer for judgments on a late hit or an early one. Therefore, when you're getting into it and trying to while out on the drums, there's no sense of varying impact when you're trying to smash the drum. With zero feedback during those times, it does seem as well an aiding factor to how complicated it feels and hard. Overall, it seems to be to truly set the drums position right where you need it. The only time I've played and made it through a song since I've had the game well with any success on that song. Took me a whole battery usage in my headset to set the drums up. Keep in mind I have been blinding my left eye from birth but do have developed debt perception to a significant enough degree that being a proud owner of every drum and game that has come out for the metaquest 2. I'll brush my shoulder off and say that for the ones well made I'd beat that crud up! Lol. Devs I really love this game. And I'm not sure if my feedback will really do you need justice or not? But if there's anything you can do about that for me, I'm totally down to sing your praises on all the socials, the medias, the book, face, the tweeters, and so on

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review. We are trying to improve the game always we can. We will try to keep the evolution. Keep drumming

Edit: Check it out the new update!

reviews.review_description: This is very good the music over rides the drum sounds some and washes out the cymbals alot can't hear the cymbals much at all. But maybe some kind of equalizer settings is easy fix maybe the response times little more crisper and more feed back in the hands and this will been a greatest drum app more songs and rights and a way to free drum too and just play solo not just too the script nice job excited for more.

developer_response.body: Hey SirStevenPearl, thank you for the review! We just released an entire new version with more songs! Also, we updated the core game for the v 1.1 , check it out and let us know!! Thanks

reviews.review_description:
Being an avid drummer after first playing Rock Band on Xbox it was awesome to discover this game when i bought my OQ2!
Pros: For a demo it has a BUNCH of songs! compared to Smash Drums Demo which only has 3!
Its good how you can adjust your kit to suit your playstyle.
Can teach you drums if you persist and practice enough.

Cons: No difficulty adjustment, though I dont have any problems with the pace being a drummer but to beginners it might be quite overwhelming.
Only other con is that the game isnt fully released! Hurry up and take my money!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! Keep Grooving! 

Edit: We just add the difficulty adjustment and a bunch of new songs, enjoy!

reviews.review_description:
I won't lie, I've never drummed in my life, but I am one of those who has always air drummed to Phil Collins! Now the tutorial was useful as it showed how bad my hand eye coordination is! Once I figured out how to scroll up the music list I listened to a few samples and what would be great to see in future developments is grouped levels of difficulty: Novice to Expert and even have funny names for the levels like Garage, School, Festival, Arena, Stadium for example.
A lot like Beat Saber, I think there is a lot of exercise potential in this too. Good job, so far.

developer_response.body:
Hey Jayke1981! We add a new difficulty on the game, we hope this can improve your experience with the game!
Also, we updated the core game for the v 1.1 , check it out and let us know!!

reviews.review_description:
potential but....
a, must be allowed to drop the whole set down. Seat heights differ.
b, contact with the drums is awful. I know I am in time but they do not register the hit
c, the hit point is not when the it reaches the centre of the drums. It seems to be as it gets there. Hence timing out.
d, too much too soon. Songs are almost impossible for even an experienced drummer. 
e, The height the the hits cone to you are wrong. You should be able to look down on them. They are eye height.
f, Tutorial is so wrong. Far to complicated. If you are trying to get a new person onto drums this will put them off straight away.
g, You need to enable a person to yse the kit freestyle so that they can get used to the set up.
h, Start with sraight 4 4 easy songs and progress. This is like going into expert mode instantly.
As an experienced drummer I gave up after 15 mins.
Hopefully it will improve so I will be coming back to it in the future but sadly for now uninstall.
I don't see how you can charge for this in the present phase of development.

developer_response.body:
Thank you sir for your review. I'm sure there are points we can improve and we are working on it. But you are defining an experience you would like to have and I feel that this is not fair. And as you said, you can always uninstall the app and leave a zero star with all the points of your dream game, at the end, we are not sorry that you did not play your dream game. It's what it is. 

Thanks again for you review

2025 - Try to play the game again. Updated.
